description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to build the project on multiple platforms (Linux, Windows, macOS) with different compilers (gcc, clang, cl). For each job, check out the repository, install required packages, set up a cache, and configure the environment. Then, generate project files with cmake, compile the source code, and install the build artifacts. Finally, archive the build artifacts and display ccache statistics.
